detail.description:
Certificate of Registration for Providing Online Electronic Game Services (G2, G3, G4), No. 318/GCN-PTTH&TTĐT, issued by the Authority of Broadcasting and Electronic Information on December 24, 2024.

Return to Childhood – Cozy Village Life Simulation
Return to Childhood is a cozy idle village simulation game inspired by Vietnamese childhood memories from the early 2000s.
Play nostalgic mini games, build your village, upgrade houses, and earn money over time in a relaxing idle experience.

Key F
